blockers_encountered.description: tests/test_fathom_init.py::test_init_engine_with_fathomdb fails in the full no-network suite (init_engine returns None — fathomdb driver not installed). Verified failing on the pre-change baseline via git stash; unrelated to this pack (fathom_init untouched).
blockers_encountered.resolution: Not in scope — pre-existing/environmental; left as-is.

blockers_encountered.description: test_disabled_path_no_engine_no_raise initially failed without sqlalchemy: _insert -> _ensure_initialized raises ImportError before the URL check (pre-existing behavior, behavior-preserving). The 'URL-unset disabled path' semantics only hold when sqlalchemy is installed.
blockers_encountered.resolution: Guarded that single test with @pytest.mark.skipif(not _SA_AVAILABLE) (mirrors test_sql_logger's module skip). Verified GREEN with --extra sql (16 passed).

additional_changes_made_in_scope: sql_logger.py: dropped now-unused imports (datetime, json, _serialize from enterprise_logger) after _build_record deletion; added 'from .projections import project_sql'.

test_sql_logger.py: re-pointed log_success_event/log_failure_event tests through record_event(build_request_event(...)); renamed test_async_delegates -> test_async_dispatch_inserts (deleted async method delegated to same _insert; normal sink reaches _insert via recorder.dispatch(is_async=True)). Assertions preserved, never weakened.
agent_verify_result: pass — targeted: 78 passed (with --extra sql: 16 passed incl. DB round-trip + disabled-path). Full no-network suite: 2553 passed, 98 skipped, 1 xpassed, 1 failed (test_fathom_init::test_init_engine_with_fathomdb — pre-existing, unrelated). Lint+format clean on all changed files.
